document.title: CsI Scintillator (AR-A7-1000) PQCP 제/개정 이력 / HAD1717MC CsI Scintillator QC 공정도

sourceSummary.oneLine: Rev.0 process quality control plan for HAD1717MC CsI Scintillator manufacturing and inspection.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Defines process steps, inspection criteria, control frequency, equipment/JIG, responsible departments, control methods, and inspection records for HAD1717MC CsI Scintillator production.
keyPoints: Document number is A-PQCP-1-006 and the creation date is 2019.08.07.

Process controls cover incoming inspection, CsI deposition, thickness measurement, appearance inspection, characteristic inspection, heat treatment, UV/O3 treatment, sealing, AL sheet vacuum pressing, OLB bonding, Tuffy application, and final inspection.
Inspection frequency is generally 매 LOT or 매 공정 with 전수 검사.
Final driving inspection records Sensitivity and MTF under RQA5 conditions.

evidence.claim: The document applies to model HAD1717MC.
The document identifies the product family as HAD1717MC CsI Scintillator.
evidence.evidenceText: 제 품 군,,HAD1717MC CsI Scintillator QC 공정도

evidence.claim: Incoming TFT panel appearance and measurement inspection includes no scratches, stains, crack, chipping, dent, or interface pad discoloration, with weight 350±5g, size 445*445±0.3mm, and thickness 0.7±0.05mm.
evidence.evidenceText:
• Scratch : 없을 것
• 찍힘, 얼룩 : 없을 것
• Crack, Chipping, Dent : 없을 것
• Interface Pad : 변색 없을 것
• 무게 : 350±5g
• Size : 445*445 ±0.3mm
• Thickness : 0.7 ±0.05mm

evidence.claim: CsI deposition preparation controls include CsI input amount, TlI/TI source weight, quartz crystal lifetime, crucible heater resistance, sensor limits, pumping vacuum, preheat recipe number, and cryo open time.
evidence.evidenceText:
• CsI 투입량 : Panel 1매/2kg, 2매/3kg, 3매/5kg
• TI Boat + TL원료 = 45.5±1g
... • 증착기 Pumping :
 - Pumping완료후 진공 도달 - 9E^-06Torr 이하
• 예열 Recipe No 기록
• Cryo Open Time :
 - Main Chamber 50min 이하
 - LL Chamber 10Min 이하

evidence.claim: The CsI deposition scanning step is marked CTQ.
CsI thickness measurement criteria include TD direction 9 points and MD direction 8 points with CsI thickness 300±20um and uniformity less than 5%.
evidence.evidenceText:
• TD방향 :
 - 9Point 측정, 두께 300±20um/Uniformity 〈 5%
• MD방향 :
 - 8Point 측정 ... CsI 두께 300±20um / Uniformity 〈 5%

evidence.claim: Characteristic inspection dummy cell direct measurement criteria are CTF at least 20% and light output at least 200%.
evidence.evidenceText:
• Dummy cell 특성 Spec. (Direct 측정 기준)
 1) CTF : 20% 이상
 2) 광량 : 200% 이상

evidence.claim: Vacuum oven heat treatment condition is 120℃ for 72 hours.
Seal dispensing uses Epoxy Nagase-XNR5570 and Needle 18G.
Final inspection measurement specifications include panel size 445mm±0.3mm, total weight 650g±50g, and total thickness 1.2mm±0.1mm.
evidence.evidenceText:
• 측정 검사 항목 & SPEC
 1) Panel Size : 445mm±0.3mm
 2) Total Weight : 650g±50g
 3) Total Thickness : 1.2mm±0.1mm

evidence.claim: Final driving inspection records Sensitivity and MTF under RQA5 conditions.
evidence.evidenceText:
• Sensitivity & MTF
 - RQA5 조건 (SID 150cm, 70kv, mA, mSec, mAs)
 - MTF & Sensitivity 측정 결과 기록

evidence.claim: Final driving inspection MTF criteria include 0.1 lp/mm at least 93, 0.5 lp/mm at least 75, 1.0 lp/mm at least 55, 2.0 lp/mm at least 34, and 3.0 lp/mm at least 15.
Final driving inspection sensitivity criterion is CsI minimum 110 lsb/uGy.

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is stated in the source text; authoritySignal is general.
No explicit CE MDD authority statement appears in the source text despite the sourcePath being under a CE MDD folder.
Some OCR or source text quality issues are present, including apparent typos such as 쳬결, Seensitivity, and inconsistent TI/Tl/TL notation.
Cooling evidence appears internally inconsistent: 'Cooling : 40Min 이상 -> 작업지도서 2시간 이상'.
